scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER -c cyan,green "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.agent:fix: echo 'Running Claude self-fix agent...' && node scripts/agent-fix.js
